message:
feat(harness): add flicker/tear detection module for visual artifact analysis

New flicker_detection.rs module provides infrastructure for detecting
visual artifacts in ANSI output streams:

Core capabilities:
- Sync Output Mode tracking (DEC private mode 2026 brackets)
- Detection of content emitted outside synchronized frame boundaries
- Partial clear detection (ED/EL commands mid-frame)
- Incomplete frame detection (started but not completed)
- Interleaved write detection (overlapping frames)

JSONL logging schema:
- Stable schema with run_id, timestamp_ns, event_type, severity
- Event types: sync_gap, partial_clear, incomplete_frame, etc.
- Context includes frame_id, byte_offset, and line number
- Severity levels: info, warning, error

This enables automated testing for visual correctness by analyzing
raw terminal output for patterns known to cause flicker or tearing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
